mapper.select:
select a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.phone, a.user_number, a.station_id, c.org_id, c.org_name, d.position_name, e.superassist_id, e.avatar, e.intro, e.name,
COALESCE(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT b.user_type), ','), '') as user_types_str
COALESCE(LISTAGG(DISTINCT b.user_type, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY b.user_type), '') as user_types_str
COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT b.user_type), '') as user_types_str
from po_users a left join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id left join po_organization c on b.org_id = c.org_id left join po_position d on b.position_id = d.position_id left join suas_superassist e on a.user_id = e.superassist_id and e.status = '00'
and a.state ='A'
AND STRPOS(concat('.', c.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
AND INSTR(concat('.', c.path_code, '.'), concat('.', #{orgId}, '.')) > 0
AND c.org_id =#{orgId}
AND (a.user_code LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{keyword}),'%') OR a.user_name LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{keyword}),'%'))
and b.position_id =#{positionId}
and b.user_type =#{userType}
group by a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.phone, a.user_number, a.station_id, b.org_id, c.org_id, c.org_name, b.position_id, d.position_name, e.superassist_id, e.avatar, e.intro, e.name

select a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.email, a.phone, a.user_number, a.station_id, b.position_id, b.org_id, c.org_name,
COALESCE(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT b.user_type), ','), '') as user_types_str
COALESCE(LISTAGG(DISTINCT b.user_type, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY b.user_type), '') as user_types_str
COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT b.user_type), '') as user_types_str
from po_users a left join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id left join po_organization c on b.org_id = c.org_id
a.state !='X'
and a.user_id =#{userId}
and b.org_id =#{orgId}
group by a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.email, a.phone, a.user_number, a.station_id, b.org_id, c.org_id, c.org_name, b.position_id
select a.user_id from po_users a join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id where a.state != 'X' and b.org_id = #{orgId} group by a.user_id
select a.user_id from po_users a join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id where a.state != 'X' and b.position_id = #{postId} group by a.user_id
select a.user_id from po_users a where a.state != 'X' and a.station_id = #{stationId} group by a.user_id

select a.user_id, a.user_name, a.email, a.phone, a.user_code, a.pwd, a.address, a.remark, a.user_eff_date, a.user_exp_date, a.create_date, a.update_date, a.state, a.state_time, a.is_locked, a.last_login_date, a.security_question_id, a.security_answer, a.thumbnail_uri, a.ext_attr, a.assistant_id, a.user_number, a.po_user_external_system_id, a.station_id from po_users a join po_user_external_system b on a.user_id = b.user_id where b.union_id =#{unionId}

select a.user_id from po_users a join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id where a.state != 'X'
and b.org_id in
#{orgId}
group by a.user_id

select a.user_id from po_users a where a.state != 'X'
and a.station_id in
#{stationId}
group by a.user_id

select a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.email, a.phone, a.user_number, a.station_id from po_users a where a.state !='X' and a.user_code in
#{code}
